name: Shrimp-Cheese Roll
recipeIngredient: 2 Eggs 1 Egg yolk mixed with 1 teaspoon water (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the Muenster cheese, cooked shrimp, sliced green onions, salt, pepper, and egg mixture; set aside.
2. Unroll the crescent roll dough on a lightly floured surface. Pinch together the perforations on both sides of the dough. Fold in half crosswise and use a lightly floured rolling pin to roll out to a 14x9 inch rectangle.
3. Brush the dough with butter. Spread the cheese-shrimp mixture in a 2-inch strip along one long edge of the dough.
4. Roll up the dough as a jelly roll, firmly pinching the seam and ends together. Moisten slightly with water and smooth lightly with the dull edge of a knife to seal the dough well.
5. Lift the roll onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Brush with egg-yolk mixture.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool on a rack for 20 minutes. Cut into 1/2-inch slices. Makes 28.
